name: Question Differentiation Architecture (QDA) — design only
core_thesis: Question Intelligence Problem != Missing Metadata. Question Intelligence Problem = Missing Differentiation Architecture.

phase1_differentiation_contribution.metric: realized = 1 - within-tag weighted HHI; contribution% = realized / Σrealized

dev_stage.failure_mode: low ceiling — only differentiator but caps at 5 values

primary_capability.failure_mode: UNIFORMITY only — largest unused headroom (1 value/tag)

phase4_diversity_standards.unit: per bridge tag; absolute floors, also expressed as % of pool where pool is small
phase4_diversity_standards.rationale: median pool is 40 Qs — easily holds 5-8 coherent capabilities; floors scale down for the smallest (25-Q) pools to avoid forcing incoherent spread.

question_relevance_score.definition: match between question metadata and the runtime context, over ROUTING dimensions only
question_relevance_score.formula: QRS = Σ w_d * match(meta_d, ctx_d), match in [0,1]

question_differentiability_score.definition: how distinguishable a question is from its tag-pool siblings, over ENRICHABLE high-headroom dimensions
question_differentiability_score.formula: QDS = mean_d (1 - pool_share(meta_d)); pool_share = fraction of the tag's questions sharing this value

qis_v2.weighting_rationale: weight proportional to (differentiation headroom x routing value); high-cardinality enrichable dims (capability/behavior/signal/context) weighted up, low-cardinality inherited dims (age/persona/stage) weighted down. Mirrors the Phase-1 contribution analysis.

phase6_c2_blueprint.scope_reality: only 325 bridge tags exist (not 500); 758 concerns have >=10 Qs (326 are zero-signal); 'Top 1000 questions' = all Qs in the top signal-zero large-pool tags.
sequencing: C-2.1 Signal backfill on the 144 signal-blind tags / 326 zero-signal large concerns (coverage failure first — cheapest, highest deficit).
C-2.2 Stand up Context dimension (new column + evidence-derived per-question values).
C-2.3 Stand up Archetype dimension (question-form classifier, evidence-derived).
C-2.4 Per-question Capability + Behavior enrichment on top-priority tags (uniformity failure on high-headroom dims).
C-2.5 Re-measure differentiability + Selection-AIS/Trust/Routing before-vs-after with the AQ-2R shared scorer.

estimates_NOT_MEASURED.expected_differentiability: projection: 0.096 -> ~0.40-0.55 if capability/behavior/signal enriched + context/archetype stood up; bounded because age/persona/stage cannot move much.
estimates_NOT_MEASURED.expected_runtime_impact: additive, flag-gated re-rank; negligible latency (per-question join already proven in AQ-2R).
estimates_NOT_MEASURED.expected_routing_impact: directional positive, bounded by the 76.3% of Qs in high-uniformity pools; not quantifiable pre-enrichment.
estimates_NOT_MEASURED.expected_risk: semantic incoherence if enrichment is mechanical; mitigated by evidence-derivation + a quality gate that REJECTS generic fallbacks (PIL precedent).

go_no_go.recommendation: GO to build C-2 on this architecture, CONDITIONAL on approval of the Context/Archetype taxonomies and diversity standards here; phased (coverage -> new dims -> uniformity), each phase measured and reversible.
go_no_go.do_not: do not enrich blindly from tags, do not over-invest in age/persona/stage (low ceiling), do not skip the measurement gate.
